description: Multiple services degraded. Cascading failures detected -- order processing is failing, but the root cause is not immediately obvious. Investigate logs, metrics, and service dependencies to identify the root cause and remediate.

inventory-service.message: c.a.i.repo.StockRepository [db-pool-thread-9] - slow query: SELECT stock FROM items WHERE sku IN (?,?,?,...+247) elapsed=4500ms rows=250 plan=SeqScan on items (cost=0.00..18472.00)

c.a.i.db.PgConnectionPool [pool-1-thread-6] - FATAL: too many connections for role "inventory_app" at 10.0.7.22:5432 (max_connections=100, current=100)

root_cause.description: inventory-service v2.5.1 deployment introduced a memory leak in the DB connection pooling layer. The inventory-db ran out of connections and then was OOM-killed, causing cascading failures in order-service, payment-api, and api-gateway.
